changelog: New: TL-SHORT tab - browse/search 434+ dramas, download ALL episodes free (no login/proxy)
New: KissKH tab - search Asian dramas, choose subtitle language, download + .srt
New: FlickReels Version 1/2 selector in Settings
Fix: stable machine fingerprint (no more false 'bound to another PC')
Fix: DramaShorts 'Unknown Series', DramaReels stale-file, StardustTV console
Simple UI: download log, Error Eps column, clickable logos
